behavior_summary: U8P_TOMB::hatch is a process that runs when the tomb/U8P_TOMB::hatch trigger is activated and handles a first-time scripted encounter where disturbing the tomb spawns a hostile guardian.
The routine gates the sequence by a persistent flag (metKhumash) so the cinematic/ambush only occurs the first time.

During the sequence the avatar is suspended (frozen), the camera is moved to focus on the U8P_TOMB::hatch, a warning bark is played, then an NPC (tomb guardian) is created, placed at/near the U8P_TOMB::hatch, marked hostile, forced into combat, and assigned the avatar as its target.
After setup the avatar is unfrozen and camera re-centering is restored; the metKhumash flag is set to prevent repetition.
notable_control_flow: Entry is a trigger-based process (process type 0x0210) — likely invoked on fast-area/trigger entry for the U8P_TOMB::hatch region.
Early conditional: proceed only when metKhumash == 0 (first disturbance).
Set metKhumash = 1 before spawning to mark the encounter as seen.
Sequence uses suspend/spawn/pid timing helpers to orchestrate a short camera/cinematic and delay the spawn until after the bark/animation.
Spawn/create NPC and immediately configure it (alignment, in-combat state, target) so the ambush begins as control is returned to the player.
open_questions: Exact trigger event name: the code implies a fast-area/trigger entry (enterFastArea) but that is inferred rather than explicit.
What precisely FREE::func1C8B does (timing helper, animation, or other) — its role is uncertain and likely related to camera/timing.
Precise numeric meaning of the spawn/pop offset (the code uses an X+0x00C8 offset) and why that offset is chosen.
Whether any additional logic (e.g., respawn conditions or persistence beyond metKhumash) exists elsewhere in game scripts affecting this encounter.

main_function.name: U8P_TOMB::hatch
main_function.purpose: Handle the first-time disturbance of the Khumash-Gor tomb: play a short cinematic (freeze avatar, focus camera, bark), mark the tomb as encountered, spawn a hostile tomb guardian at the U8P_TOMB::hatch, force it into combat and target the avatar, then restore normal control.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the U8P_TOMB::hatch/tomb process trigger (process type 0x0210) — likely a fast-area/trigger region activation.
Only executes the ambush branch when global flag metKhumash == 0 (first time the player disturbs the tomb).

function_map.name: U8P_TOMB::hatch
function_map.role: first-time tomb encounter handler (camera sequence, bark, spawn hostile NPC, set target)

function_map.role: spawned helper used to move/aim camera to the U8P_TOMB::hatch coordinates for the cinematic

function_map.role: auxiliary spawned helper (likely timing/animation-related); exact purpose uncertain

function_map.name: Camera::setCenterOn
function_map.role: restore camera centering (likely back to avatar) after the cinematic

external_calls.purpose: Freeze the avatar at the start of the cinematic (param 0x01) and unfreeze at the end (param 0x00).
Read U8P_TOMB::hatch X coordinate to position camera and compute NPC spawn X (+ offset).
Read U8P_TOMB::hatch Y coordinate for camera/spawn placement.
Read U8P_TOMB::hatch Z coordinate for spawn placement.
Start a spawned routine to focus/move the camera to the U8P_TOMB::hatch for the short cinematic.
Spawned auxiliary function used during the sequence, likely for timing/delay; exact effect uncertain.
Recenter camera (argument 0x01 likely means center on avatar) after cinematic completes.
Create an instance of the tomb-guardian NPC (type id 0x019B) and store its reference into local2.
Place/pop the created NPC into the world at coordinates derived from the U8P_TOMB::hatch (Z,Y,X+offset).
Mark the spawned NPC as hostile (alignment 0x20) so it treats the player as an enemy.
Put the spawned NPC into active combat state immediately after spawning.
Assign the avatar (target id 0x01) as the NPC's combat target so it will attack the player.

reads.name: metKhumash
reads.likely_effect: Read to check whether the player has already disturbed Khumash-Gor; proceeds only if 0 (not met).

writes.name: metKhumash
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 to record that the player has encountered the tomb so the cinematic/ambush does not repeat.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_TOMB::hatch is a process that runs when the tomb/U8P_TOMB::hatch trigger is activated and handles a first-time scripted encounter where disturbing the tomb spawns a hostile guardian.
